key_insights.insight: Early childhood experiences and traumas can be the biggest drivers in life, shaping personal greatness in unexpected ways.
key_insights.quote: my own like childhood traumas or the things that made me feel a bit invalid or insecure or felt feel shame when I was younger, ended up being like the biggestdrivers in my life.

key_insights.insight: It's crucial to check if your actions align with your feelings, especially in relationships, avoiding simply "talking a good talk."
key_insights.quote: our actions have to line up with the way that we're feeling. And I felt that there was times when I was talking a good talk, but the way I'm acting is no different than what i was how i was acting before

key_insights.insight: True love starts after the romantic phase, when the initial intoxication wears off and you still maintain the same feelings.
key_insights.quote: when you wake up after the hangover and it's real, you're still having the same feeling. And love starts then.

key_insights.insight: Success can become a trap when you try to find self-worth through other people's expectations.
key_insights.quote: the curse of all happiness and joy and you must know thisyou're just trying to equate what yourself worth through so many other people's expectation of you

key_insights.insight: There can be immense character found during your lows.
key_insights.quote: the roller coaster ride is you find character in your lows

key_insights.insight: When intuition speaks quietly, it is important to listen and adjust your path.
key_insights.quote: intuition is very quiet and it's it creeps up

key_insights.insight: Sometimes, not doing anything is key to growth, allowing the world to work behind the scenes.
key_insights.quote: sometimes doing nothing don't don't don't think that the world isn't working for you behind the scenes

key_insights.insight: When creating a song, it's important to check in with the feelings it gives you as an artist.
key_insights.quote: when i was the kid growing up making the first album i was feelingeverything i was feeling the song on the way home from the studio i was feeling it on mysubspeaker at home i was feeling those rides up in the car to do the performance it was feelingand now i check in with that deeply

actionable_advice.how_to: Create a safe space with people you trust where it is easy to share how you're feeling

actionable_advice.advice: When starting something new, immerse yourself fully.
actionable_advice.how_to: Focus on what is happening now instead of worrying about what might happen next week
When you have an ache or pain, don't ignore it. Focus on that part of the body to understand it before pushing through the pain.

memorable_stories: Bullying experiences at an all-boys school related to physical intimidation and the dilemma of reporting to teachers.
Selling chocolates with expiration dates at a markup during secondary school
Meeting Stevie Wonder at the House of Blues when Stevie sang along to Craig's performance of Walking Away
Recalling how he had to be put on a security guards' shoulders to reach the venue due to fans.
contrarian_claims: The idea that 'manning up' or 'rolling with it' when experiencing mental health struggles is actually harmful and contributes to high suicide rates.
That relationships need to be heart-based, not patriarchal.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Craig David Opens Up About His Painful Rise, Fall & Redemption
